item.title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.

item.title: Why enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: While Silicon Valley continues pushing aggressively into large language models and consumer-facing AI products, many European companies are focused on applying AI to complex systems already embedded into everyday life.

item.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

item.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

item.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation from S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.

item.title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

item.title: Evotrex raises $30M to build the RV that doesn’t need a charging station
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The startup is one of many entering the RV space, but it's banking on a hybrid power system that can go far beyond campsites.

item.title: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

item.title: How to apply to Startup Battlefield 2026, what you need ahead of today’s June 8 deadline
item.dc:creator: Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: Startup Battlefield applications are due tomorrow, so now's the time to put the finishing touches on your submission!

item.title: Beyond Instagram: Introducing the next generation of social apps
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: These newer social apps offer alternatives to Big Tech’s feeds, focusing on interests, creativity, and community.

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Applications for Startup Battlefield 200 officially close on June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Don't wait any longer. Secure your shot at competing on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 this October at San Francisco's Moscone West.

item.title: The most interesting startups right now want to get you off your phone
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: While the AI fundraising machine keeps breaking its own records, some founders are building in the other direction.  Mirror founder Brynn Putnam just raised money for Board, a startup focused on bringing people together through in-person games and social experiences. Cyberdeck creators are going viral crafting whimsical DIY computers that literally encourage users to touch grass. Unlike the AI-free browser crowd, this doesn’t just feel like backlash, […]

item.title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Supabase, an example of an open source project becoming a fast-growing company, has greatly benefited from AI tools like Claude, Codex, and other vibe-coding platforms.

item.title: The ‘together tech’ wave might be the most intriguing startup bet of 2026
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo, Anthony Ha, Kirsten Korosec, Sean O'Kane
item.description: While the AI fundraising machine keeps breaking its own records, some founders are building in the other direction.  Mirror founder Brynn Putnam just raised money for Board, a startup focused on bringing people together through in-person games and social experiences. Cyberdeck creators are going viral crafting whimsical DIY computers that literally encourage users to touch grass. Unlike the AI-free browser crowd, this doesn’t just feel like backlash, […]

item.title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: On Thursday, June 18, at The Aerospace Corporation Campus, investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather for an evening of conversation exploring some of the most consequential shifts taking place across venture capital, defense technology, artificial intelligence, and advanced industry. Secure your spot today.

item.title: Startup Battlefield is returning to Australia — here’s what happened the last time we came to Sydney
item.dc:creator: Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: On August 19, Startup Battlefield is returning to Sydney in partnership with Stripe, one of the world's most iconic technology companies. We're taking over Stripe Tour Sydney for a night that the Australian startup ecosystem won't forget.

item.title: Helion, the Sam Altman-backed fusion startup, raises $465M to build a power plant for Microsoft
item.dc:creator: Tim De Chant
item.description: Fusion startup Helion is racing to complete a power plant for Microsoft by 2028. A fresh infusion of cash should help with that.

item.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
item.description: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.
